data.content: Implemented full-pool rotation for take-loop retries. Added per-queue failed-agent tracking, made failure-driven pool rotation work even in basic dispatch mode when a pool exists, and changed pool exclusion to return null instead of silently falling back to an excluded agent. Added tests covering strict exclusion, basic-mode error retry rotation, full-pool rotation across repeated failures, and early stop once all pooled agents have failed. Validation: bun run lint (passes with existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: beat/foolery-20ee. Commit: 598b787ed33e.
